name: cdk-cv-updater-crash-course
description: One-hour AWS CDK TypeScript crash course demo with separated application and IaC folders.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix service install && npm --prefix cdk install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm run service:build && npm run frontend:build && npm run cdk:build
scripts.synth: npm run frontend:build && npm --prefix cdk run synth
scripts.diff: npm run frontend:build && npm --prefix cdk run diff
scripts.deploy: npm run frontend:build && npm --prefix cdk run deploy
scripts.test:static: npm run build && npm run synth
